instructions: Apply the repo's shared PR review standards in REVIEW.md (code rules for all PRs; article/note rules when _notes/** or _posts/** changes). Treat its blocking red lines as high severity.

files.description: Shared PR review standards for this repo — code/engineering rules (all PRs) and article/note-quality rules incl. citation integrity and no-fabrication guardrails (PRs touching _notes/** or _posts/**).
